title: War-room: add pre-H100 smoke bundle
author: omar07ibrahim
body:
# Summary

Adds a CPU-only `tools/pre_h100_smoke.py` helper for pre-H100 validation of Parameter Golf record folders.

It checks:

- Python compile/AST sanity for the record `train_gpt.py`
- exact synthetic sliding-window target coverage
- tokenizer metadata NPZ shape/scalar sanity without importing numpy/torch
- decimal 16,000,000-byte artifact accounting with optional trained artifact

# Evidence

Verified locally from `war-room/agent-016`:

```bash
python3 -m py_compile tools/pre_h100_smoke.py
python3 tools/pre_h100_smoke.py --record-dir records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-31_Scylla_FullGPTQ_XSA11_FA3_0.9485 --vocab-size 998
python3 tools/pre_h100_smoke.py --record-dir records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-31_Scylla_FullGPTQ_XSA11_FA3_0.9485 --vocab-size 998 --coverage-policy legacy
```

Exact mode passed. Legacy coverage intentionally failed on duplicate target coverage, which is the falsification check.

# Status

Draft from the autonomous war-room. Needs human review before marking ready.
